summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cross-Skill Schedule app with new Scenario Comparison feature. Backend APIs for scenario management working well (89.5% success rate). Frontend Compare tab fully functional with scenario builder, comparison charts, and all existing tabs working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: File upload tests failing with 422 error - Expected UploadFile, received string
flaky_endpoints.workaround: File upload format issue in test, actual functionality works via frontend

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Default requirements data retrieval
Sample template download (.xlsx format)
Run Schedule with default data (212 agents, 14 shifts)
Project-specific shifts validation (9 English: E05-E20, 5 Language: L07-L11)
List schedules endpoint (17 scenarios found)
Get specific schedule by ID
Excel export for all types (shiftwise, roster, gap, sla)
POST /api/run-scenario with custom off-day profiles creates named scenarios
POST /api/compare with multiple IDs returns comparison data for 2+ scenarios
DELETE /api/schedule/{id} removes scenarios successfully
Home page loads with 5 tabs including Compare tab
Compare tab visible in tabs bar with Scales icon
Compare tab shows 'New Scenario' button that opens scenario builder
Scenario builder has name input field
Scenario builder shows off-day profile cards with +/- controls
Scenario builder agent counter updates when profile counts change (212 → 213 → 212)
Scenario builder Run Scenario button creates and saves scenarios
Scenario list shows 20 saved scenarios with name, agent count, avg SLA
Scenario list checkboxes allow selecting/deselecting scenarios
Compare button appears when 2+ scenarios selected
Compare button triggers comparison and loads results
Comparison results show side-by-side summary cards with different border colors
Comparison results display combined SLA bar chart with all scenarios
Comparison results show radar performance chart
Comparison results include detailed SLA table comparing all days across scenarios
Delete scenario buttons present on scenario items
Existing tabs (Shiftwise, Gap, Roster, SLA) still work correctly
Shiftwise tab: Shows shift counts table and export functionality
Gap Dashboard: Day selector and project filter work correctly
Agent Roster: Search functionality and pagination work
SLA Analysis: Daily SLA table and hourly coverage charts with day selector
